response:
Yes we can check how long it took for udp packet to be sent to server like ping but only one direction

To do this we can use a timer and measure the time between sending the packet and receiving a response

We can also use the System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch class to measure the time

We can also use the NetworkInterface.GetIsNetworkAvailable method to check if the network is available

We can also use the System.Net.Sockets.UdpClient class to send and receive udp packets
